seoTitle: Vittoria vs Voyager Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Vittoria and Voyager Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Vittoria vs Voyager Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Vittoria and Voyager Point.
heading: Vittoria vs Voyager Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Vittoria, New South Wales and Voyager Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Voyager Point has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Vittoria (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Vittoria or Voyager Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Vittoria has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Voyager Point scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Vittoria scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Voyager Point scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Vittoria or Voyager Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Voyager Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
